title: Login Issue
description: User cannot login even after resetting password.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing.

title: Account Verification Problem
description: User did not receive verification email after registration.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows incorrect city even after updating.

title: Website Slow Loading
description: User reports that dashboard takes too long to load.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received it.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Reset link expires immediately after opening the email.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: User gets 'Upload failed' error while uploading profile photo.

title: Notification Email Not Received
description: User does not receive email notifications for updates.

title: Mobile App Crash
description: App crashes when user tries to open settings page.

title: Search Function Not Working
description: Search returns no results even when items exist.

title: Order History Missing
description: Customer cannot see previous orders in their account.

title: Coupon Code Invalid
description: Valid coupon code shows invalid during checkout.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: User cannot receive OTP for login verification.

title: Profile Information Not Saving
description: User updates profile details but changes are not saved.
